description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single-cutaway design, featuring a glossy yellow finish on the body and a contrasting black pickguard. The neck is long and slender, made of a darker wood, and is fitted with metallic frets and white inlays. The headstock is angled and houses six tuning pegs arranged in a single row, typical of classic electric guitar designs. The bridge and pickup hardware are metallic, with a visible single-coil pickup near the bridge and a control plate with knobs and a switch. The body has a contoured edge for comfort, and the overall construction suggests a robust, high-quality instrument. This guitar is visually striking and would stand out in urban environments such as street performances, music venues, or public parks.
description: A glossy yellow, single-cutaway electric guitar with a black pickguard, metallic hardware, and a dark wood neck. It features a classic headstock with six tuning pegs and a single visible pickup.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim profile, yellow body, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow body, black pickguard, metallic bridge, and the arrangement of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body contour, neck, and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the yellow body, the neck joint, and the headstock from behind.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic Telecaster-style shape
